hooks.command: sh -c 'set -eu; rel_target="$1"; shift; cache_root="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.config/codex}/plugins/cache"; export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:$HOME/.bun/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; for plugin_root in "$cache_root"/*/ccs/0.1.2; do [ -d "$plugin_root" ] || continue; target="$plugin_root/$rel_target"; if [ -f "$target" ]; then export CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$plugin_root}"; cd "$(dirname "$target")"; exec "$target" "$@"; fi; echo "error: Codex plugin hook target not found: $target" >&2; exit 127; done; echo "error: Codex plugin cache not found for ccs@0.1.2: $rel_target" >&2; exit 127' sh hooks/install-deps.sh

sh -c 'set -eu; rel_target="$1"; shift; cache_root="${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.config/codex}/plugins/cache"; export PATH="$HOME/.local/share/mise/shims:$HOME/.bun/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH"; for plugin_root in "$cache_root"/*/ccs/0.1.2; do [ -d "$plugin_root" ] || continue; target="$plugin_root/$rel_target"; if [ -f "$target" ]; then export CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$plugin_root}"; cd "$(dirname "$target")"; exec "$target" "$@"; fi; echo "error: Codex plugin hook target not found: $target" >&2; exit 127; done; echo "error: Codex plugin cache not found for ccs@0.1.2: $rel_target" >&2; exit 127' sh hooks/codex-hook-runner.sh hooks/entry/ccs-symlink-check.ts
